mapper.insert: INSERT INTO service_task (id, customer_id, agent_id, request_source, status, priority, category, summary, ai_suggestion, assigned_to, unread_count, level, tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{customerId}, #{agentId}, #{requestSource}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{category}, #{summary}, #{aiSuggestion}, #{assignedTo}, #{unreadCount}, #{level}, #{tags, typeHandler=com.icss.handler.JsonListTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE service_task SET summary = #{summary}, ai_suggestion= #{aiSuggestion}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, category = #{category}, assigned_to = #{assignedTo}, unread_count = #{unreadCount}, tags = #{tags, typeHandler=com.icss.handler.JsonListTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
